repos.title: Repositories
repos.subtitle: Select a code repository to explore
repos.addDescription: Add a Git repository to automatically generate documentation and knowledge graph
repos.branchPlaceholder: main, master, develop, etc. (leave empty for default branch)
repos.privateRepoHint: For private repositories, please provide Git username and password/access token.
repos.tokenHint: For GitHub/GitLab, we recommend using Personal Access Token

confirmDelete.title: Confirm Delete Repository
confirmDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete repository {name}?
confirmDelete.warning: This action will delete the following and cannot be undone:

confirmRegenerate.title: Regenerate Repository Documentation
confirmRegenerate.message: Are you sure you want to regenerate documentation for repository {name}?
confirmRegenerate.description: This will rebuild the knowledge graph and update all research documentation.

confirmCleanGraph.title: Confirm Clean Knowledge Graph
confirmCleanGraph.message: Are you sure you want to clean the knowledge graph for project {name}?
confirmCleanGraph.warning: This action will delete all graph nodes and edges for this project and cannot be undone.

confirmRefreshGraph.title: Confirm Refresh Knowledge Graph
confirmRefreshGraph.messageRefresh: Are you sure you want to refresh the knowledge graph for project {name}?
confirmRefreshGraph.messageBuild: Are you sure you want to build the knowledge graph for project {name}?
confirmRefreshGraph.descriptionRefresh: This will re-parse the code repository and rebuild the knowledge graph, including semantic embeddings.
confirmRefreshGraph.descriptionBuild: This will parse the code repository and build the knowledge graph, including semantic embeddings.
confirmRefreshGraph.gpuHint: The system will use GPU batch processing to accelerate embedding generation. Large repositories may take several minutes.
confirmRefreshGraph.fastModeHint: Skip embedding generation (faster, but no semantic search)

toast.addStarted: Repository {name} has started adding, check progress in task panel
toast.deleteSuccess: Repository completely deleted (including documentation and knowledge graph)
toast.regenerateStarted: Started regenerating {name} documentation, check progress in task panel
toast.cleanSuccess: Cleaned knowledge graph for {name}, deleted {count} nodes
toast.graphBuildTimeout: {name} knowledge graph build is taking longer, please refresh manually later

chat.title: Chat
chat.placeholder: Ask a question about the code...

operator.name: Operator Analysis
operator.description: Deep analysis of specific operator/function implementation and dependencies
operator.template:
Analyze the complete implementation of [enter operator name here]:
- Function signature and parameters
- Dependencies and call chains
- Low-level implementation (Triton/CUDA/C++ kernels)
- Performance optimization strategies
- Usage examples

research.name: Deep Research
research.description: Comprehensive deep research on a topic/area
research.template:
Deep research on [enter topic here]:
- Core concepts and design philosophy
- Architecture and component relationships
- Key implementation details
- Data flow and call chains
- Best practices and usage patterns

architecture.name: Architecture Analysis
architecture.description: Analyze system/module architecture design and patterns
architecture.template:
Analyze the architecture of [enter module/system name here]:
- Overall architecture and layering
- Core components and responsibilities
- Inter-component communication and data flow
- Design patterns used
- Extension points and interface design

dropdown.waitingInQueue: Queued and waiting for the build slot...
dropdown.deleteFolderDesc: Documents will be moved to root

empty.chatDesc: Ask any questions about the codebase and get intelligent answers with code references
empty.codeReferencesDesc: Click on code links in the documentation to view the corresponding code snippets
empty.noReposDesc: Add your first code repository to start generating smart documentation

overview.generateDocDesc: Automatically generate structured documentation based on knowledge graph
overview.focusPlaceholder: API design, performance optimization, error handling...
overview.regenerateDesc: Create new version, existing versions preserved

mermaid.zoomActive: Zoom active • Scroll to zoom • Drag to pan
mermaid.hoverToZoom: Hover to zoom • Drag to pan • Double-click for fullscreen
